caption:
Win up to AED 100,000 worth of jewellery! 🤩

Did you know about the Glittering Surprises in the City of Gold? 
✨ Ultimate jewellery extravaganza until July 23
✨ Best deals on gold, diamond, and pearl pieces in the city. Get up to 50% discount, zero making charges, and free gifts in participating outlets. 
✨ Enter a draw to win jewellery vouchers worth AED 5000 with every purchase of AED 1000 or more
✨ A total of 20 lucky winners will have the chance to take home a total of AED 100,000 worth of stunning jewellery! 
✨ Over 65 prestigious jewellery brands across 180 outlets are participating. You can find them in Gold Souk and other locations in Dubai.

Check out the City of Gold Glittering Surprises now!
